title: Native matrix converters matrix_4x4_f32_to_s32 and sub_GAME_7F058E78 hardcode fixed-point scale 65536, ignoring the runtime-mutable D_80032310 level-visibility scale
suspect: src/game/matrixmath.c FTOFIX32 macro (native branch line 506) and the two NATIVE_PORT division sites lines 721-722
repro: Load a level whose levelinfotable visibility field is not 1.0; bg.c:5143 calls matrix_4x4_7F058C4C(mCurrentLevelVisibilityScale) setting D_80032310 index 0 to 65536 times visibility. Any subsequent matrix_4x4_f32_to_s32 / sub_GAME_7F058E78 call packs/unpacks with 65536 on native vs the scaled value in retail.

history.note: ASM audit batch 15 (ranks 176, 178). Both float/fixed matrix converters diverge ONLY in the fixed-point scale source; the s16.16 bit-packing and unpacking logic is byte-identical to retail (traced instruction-by-instruction). Retail matrix_4x4_f32_to_s32 multiplies element e1 by D_80032310 index 0 (matrixmath.c:592 load, 598 mul) and e2 by D_80032310 index v0-and-1 (matrixmath.c:600-601), then truncates; sub_GAME_7F058E78 divides by the same table entries (matrixmath.c:748 and 761 for index 0, 791-797 for index v0-and-1). The compiled NATIVE_PORT bodies instead use a constant 65536 (FTOFIX32 native branch matrixmath.c:506; divides matrixmath.c:721-722). D_80032310 defaults to two copies of 65536 (matrixmath.c:16, M_U16_MAX_VALUE_F), so at default the native constant matches retail exactly. But D_80032310 index 0 is runtime-mutated: matrix_4x4_7F058C4C sets it to 65536 times arg0 (matrixmath.c:478), invoked from bg.c:5143 with the per-level mCurrentLevelVisibilityScale (levelinfotable visibility). gun.c and bondview.c wrap HUD/weapon matrix conversions in matrix_4x4_7F058C64 / _7F058C88 save-reset-restore (matrixmath.c:481-489) which only makes sense if the level scale is normally non-default. Native therefore ignores the level-visibility scale during any f32-to-s32 / s32-to-f32 conversion. Observability is low/uncertain: the s16.16 packed matrices are the RSP hardware format; on native the float matrix path (G_MTX_FLOAT_PORT) drives rendering and the identical conversion loop was deliberately compiled out of constructor_menu00_legalscreen (rank 170) on native, so the s32 output is likely vestigial. Filed as parity-divergence per the porter comment at matrixmath.c:505-506 asserting the fixed-point scale is RSP-specific. Needs a targeted check of whether any native draw path consumes the s32-packed RenderPos view/pos before promoting or closing.
